      - Chain-of-Augmentation | papers: 50f44ef10335d59cec145b15effae20ff22c1fdb; 3f49bd6b95e254d82ce1ed1bd556a7a8f81a47db; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 8fb92f51434543c4a8cd4980f84cf04552c712cc; 2502311c66b11b3d5551e13a0095f2b1a5c5455d; bfa592853d0dd06aa3202189f16cbea3da0c5d0e; a30bd328bc36a3f75aa18f653919611b1a8ea23d; e468ed6b824e60f45ba9a20b034e4090c6630751; f19e6c955b05d61aeb1cbc7580dc3723d31398ea; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; c7184f9a914dbfbad59faa5aeaf9ba7019dfcf74; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; dc256e179d4e8eff48879a40ddc414b15b0b2300; d47b9407cf0938e9f15ce019031d7cd63b308a01; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 6489640b1d30a8a3e7cb906bb6557f1ccd0d799d; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; a15364e83f8986d8b8b1b6212596071e4f2d986d; 9f22f66cacac8eebc5728cd0a28513b5e75a9a58; 498564ba804249bac269a46416ac31159ace6695; 756ea6f43ac19a5e26a168a602bef1081ce943e7; 6ab33b17cd45e7cbd2cb9b0c5a2d56e5eac1c814; b9447b25b309884be037ee25af758275b419bd95; 64e802ea8e9dbe247c31fb06184c04dbf9e55e4e; 632a758099f412b13d0a8172830a3ac7ee5e0dd5; 5cac6430bd379c9d2fe13137dfd6ae7721a2679f; 1aeb7c0d982750f16d1eaf898b0826d634d34af0
      - Taxonomy of Tasks | papers: 7c6fb21071f4d693fa1bb116da97936255f6623e; 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; 0edcd6dd2e952523c35e77d0f9cce5927b97d63e; af7acf43d41a79c5639be23769895a2b3f0350c3; 7059afa8c275391fedfeefceca258f3f6a6b063e; f8d7b0245480646abd257bac60ee37804981a0d7; 8fb92f51434543c4a8cd4980f84cf04552c712cc; c2408a3a8da4f12d3eb156fe359a96b428e5aff1; 9f22f66cacac8eebc5728cd0a28513b5e75a9a58; b9447b25b309884be037ee25af758275b419bd95; 64e802ea8e9dbe247c31fb06184c04dbf9e55e4e; b17db2508600f498cf36d8ea06716e238bebe3d7; b802df98ab31445df9770f0231b7e459b26f2fdd; 5cac6430bd379c9d2fe13137dfd6ae7721a2679f; ae06df762adcc4221162e83a737ea63cff47e65d; 6d928d835c31963ff32c5b5ec6e0dbd1cbadf2c9; 73c751a6096a169666f5cc63a7a49b13c840df34; b804bac55ac4e9e8c30ef6aab765568f5332bc85; 50f44ef10335d59cec145b15effae20ff22c1fdb; 49e9352f4b87efdbf09a5f3048d11cf83016d37d; 9efa81ec4954b0859c47dad8f42edfaf8bced69b; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; d47b9407cf0938e9f15ce019031d7cd63b308a01; 756ea6f43ac19a5e26a168a602bef1081ce943e7; cb3125e4f63f3d058a2a39270ecb585e86c3d1ff; df9c4ddabe92d2676ff1662070064960f28f8a3e; 4b0b56be0ae9479d2bd5c2f0943db1906343c10f; bfa592853d0dd06aa3202189f16cbea3da0c5d0e; 79429814fd4d967b9277af2805c53f370e52ebb5; e468ed6b824e60f45ba9a20b034e4090c6630751; f19e6c955b05d61aeb1cbc7580dc3723d31398ea; 10955e63aa49fab146267949f8ebc9ebe8275183; 6489640b1d30a8a3e7cb906bb6557f1ccd0d799d; ee5d700eeccfcfe54f9d497643bc55f8606390cd; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 65ef87567021c6c4befe1f3b7690f8bfcb337f82; 63d1b0175eadfd0021e0391f120e606505587777; 3a56bc074b8f3f985599627404b70e16fc5bce1b; e10ef2a43fb68bf8567ce752117da16a2db9ea9a; 39e0bf77300bb6df8716ce83eb8a3f6a5e3d6b20; 632a758099f412b13d0a8172830a3ac7ee5e0dd5; 6289de84a02f0c27734f295ada565603ac958948; a3ae8705daa21f4be6970d8c7685112e1e95b843; 63de69245502d9a22de04581a4b5c0168d596aa3;
